javadoc_after:
/** * {@code EngineTestKit} provides support for discovering and executing tests * for a given {@link TestEngine} and provides convenient access to the results. * *

For discovery, {@link EngineDiscoveryResults} provides access to * the {@link TestDescriptor} of the engine and any {@link DiscoveryIssue * DiscoveryIssues} that were encountered. * *

For execution, {@link EngineExecutionResults} provides a fluent * API to verify the expected results. * * @since 1.4 * @see #engine(String) * @see #engine(TestEngine) * @see #discover(String, LauncherDiscoveryRequest) * @see #discover(TestEngine, LauncherDiscoveryRequest) * @see #execute(String, LauncherDiscoveryRequest) * @see #execute(TestEngine, LauncherDiscoveryRequest) * @see EngineDiscoveryResults * @see EngineExecutionResults */
